data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or confirmations regarding the sending of email confirmations after bookings. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in fulfilling this requirement, as the system's functionality regarding email confirmations remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
